subcodes.first_line: Take heed lest thou falter, then speak forth with wondrous power, for the appointed time of silence hath passed - the day when the Sovereign of Eternity emerged from behind the veils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایاک ان لاتعجز ثم انطق بقدره بدیعه میقات صمت گذشت روزیکه سلطان بقا از حجبات
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
